summary: Reposted Fox News broadcast segment. The frame shows a studio anchor at upper right, a smaller inset of a young man's booking-style photo at lower right, and on the left a daytime exterior shot of a building signed 'FAIRFAX COUNTY ADULT DETENTION CENTER.' A red 'BREAKING NEWS' and 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner runs along the bottom with the chyron 'ILLEGAL MIGRANT GROPER SENTENCED TO 180 DAYS,' a 'LIVE' tag, and a 'FAIRFAX COUNTY, VA' location label. The audio is the anchors reporting the sentencing and an ICE detainer. No music bed.

script.scene: Split broadcast layout: detention center exterior at left, studio anchor inset upper right, defendant photo inset lower right; chyron 'ILLEGAL MIGRANT GROPER SENTENCED TO 180 DAYS,' 'FOX NEWS ALERT' banner.
